lines: Lucia moves your hand away from a black route pin. "Missing cart. Brass means the crew came back carrying less life than it took out."
The burial marker sits in the same groove as the freight tally.

choices.label: Ask what the surety charges after a loss
Leave the pins where Lucia set them

lines: "The same amount, whichever color I use. A route price can be accurate all the way down to the cruelty."

choices.label: Step back from the route board
